posts.author: Julia.Palm.Omnitas (Julia Palm)
posts.cookedHtml:
The Future of Work Management on the 19th of March!

Date: March 19, 2025
Time: 12 PM – 5 PM
Location: 38 Southwark St, London SE1 1UN

Join us on March 19th for an inspiring afternoon dedicated to transforming how you work! Discover practical ways to improve your workflows and hear success stories from other monday.com users who’ve elevated their processes to the next level.

Whether you’re seeking advanced tips, new automation ideas, or fresh ways to streamline your team’s work, our event will empower you to create more efficient and collaborative workflows.

This event is tailored for decision-makers who are ready to unlock the future of work management.

Discover the future of work management—reserve your spot today!

Omnitas Consulting

The Future of Work Management - 19th of March

A very warm welcome to our next London event on the 19th of March! Together with monday.com and Make. Sign up today through the website!

Est. reading time: 14 minutes

posts.author: Julia.Palm.Omnitas (Julia Palm)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Julietteb!
Could you please add this to the event calendar?

posts.author: sandy459333 (Sandy Esraeil)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love to attend virtually if that were possible.

posts.author: Julia.Palm.Omnitas (Julia Palm)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sandy459333,

Thank you so much for your interest in the event! Unfortunately, we won’t be live streaming it; participation is only available in person.

However, we regularly host webinars on various topics, which you are more than welcome to join online. You can find more information about upcoming webinars HERE – the page is updated continuously.

Best regards,
Julia Palm

posts.author: Deb_Turner (Deborah Turner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Julia, I accidentally registered for the event but didn’t realise it wasn’t offered online like the rest of monday raining events. I am in Australia and cannot attend. I have also sent an email. Can you please ensure I am removed form the event list and my company is not charged? Thank you.
